title: KeeperHub workflow run
description: JSON shape returned by `kh run status --json <runId>` and mirrored to the frontend's /match/[matchId] route. The narrative spec lives in docs/keeperhub-workflow.md; this file is the machine-checkable counterpart.

matchId.description: off-chain keccak256(playerA || playerB || nonce) match identifier; the same value used by MatchEscrow

runId.description: KeeperHub-assigned workflow-run identifier; passed back to `kh run status` for live polling

status.description: Top-level workflow status; matches KeeperHub's enum

steps.description: Ordered list of workflow steps. Step IDs match the table in docs/keeperhub-workflow.md.

name.description: Human-readable label for the step. Optional — clients can fall back to id.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration in milliseconds; null while pending/running.

retry_count.description: Number of retry attempts already consumed.

tx_hash.description: On-chain tx hash if this step submitted a transaction; null otherwise.

detail.description: Free-form per-step detail, e.g. drand round number for pull_drand_round, dice pair for derive_dice.

turn_index.description: 0-based per-turn step index; required for steps inside per_turn_loop.

drand_round.description: drand round number; required for pull_drand_round and derive_dice steps.
